The '''''Sarpazian Rose''''' was a [[Starship/Legends|ship]] used by the [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Bera Kazan]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. It was somewhat dented and scarred, a trait owing to the extreme conditions in which Kazan operated.<ref name="TCWg" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Sarpazian Rose'' was first mentioned in the manual packaged with [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (video game)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'']], a [[Star Wars video games|video game]] released in [[2002]].<ref name="TCWg" />

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (video game)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' video game]] {{1stm}} {{C|in game manual}}
